level_signals: Expected to operate with high autonomy and 'expansive ownership'
Partners with researchers and engineers to drive roadmaps
Described as needing 'ruthless prioritization' and frequent context switching across multiple projects

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Are proficient in SQL and Python for analysing datasets, querying databases, building dashboards, and generating actionable insights.
Are comfortable using APIs, automation, and AI tools such as Codex to accelerate workflows, remove manual overhead, and upskill quickly in unfamiliar technical areas.
Are excited to understand the technicalities of cutting-edge AI research and work alongside researchers from instantiation to launch.
Can move fluidly between research context, commercial execution, and data operations.
Want to get your hands dirty; grit and creative problem solving will be required daily
Learn technical concepts exceptionally quickly, seeking out knowledge to become proficient in areas that are new to you
Operate with high horsepower, are adept at frequent context switching and working on multiple projects at once with expansive ownership, and ruthless prioritization
Thrive in dynamic environments and can navigate ambiguity with ease

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience sourcing, evaluating, or working with startups, founder and vendors

scope.surface: Data acquisition pipeline for AI model training, evaluation, and safety; interface between research roadmap and external data offerings
primary_metrics_inferred: Data acquisition pipeline throughput and quality
Research data needs fulfilled on time
core_responsibilities: Partner with researchers to scope data needs, define success criteria, and translate priorities into clear execution plans
Identify, evaluate, and advance high impact data opportunities balancing research value, feasibility, quality, and responsible execution
Move work forward even when the path is unclear using technical judgement, creative problem solving, and scrappy execution
Use SQL, Python, dashboards, and simple tooling to track performance, quality, and blockers
Collaborate with engineers to enhance data platforms, resolve blockers, and ensure security best practices such as access management
Equip vendors and internal teams with context, standards, and operating rhythms needed to focus on the most important problems

green_flags: Clear and specific role scope — data acquisition for AI model research at a frontier lab
Described as part of a team of TPMs, indicating established peer group
Explicitly values scrappy, hands-on problem solving rather than just process management
Role sits at intersection of research and commercial execution — broad exposure
red_flags: No years-of-experience requirement stated, making seniority expectations unclear
Nice-to-have for startup/vendor sourcing is embedded awkwardly mid-sentence in the must-have section, suggesting copy-editing issues in the JD
Fully onsite at San Francisco HQ — no remote or hybrid option mentioned
